findings.detail: All 17 non-term entities (6 figure, 3 section, 1 table, 1 chapter, 6 question) have completely empty surface and definition fields across all 3 languages (JP/ZH/EN). leaf_count metadata (85) counts these empty shells as content-bearing leaves, inflating the count.
findings.evidence: 17/17 non-term entities: all surface.jp/zh/en == '' and definition.jp/zh/en == ''
findings.impact: RELEASE-IMPACTING: Figures, practice questions, section headings, and chapter markers are untranslated and have no JP anchor text вҖ” content void for ~49% of leaf_count

findings.detail: Surface punctuation inconsistency between page and glossary for MTTR JP surface: page uses ASCII '(' while glossary uses full-width 'пјҲ'. Semantically identical.
findings.impact: NON-RELEASE: Cosmetic inconsistency in parenthesis style; no semantic difference

findings.detail: гғ•гӮ©гғјгғ«гғҲгғҲгғ¬гғ©гғігғҲ (p383) EN definition ends without terminal period: '...even if a failure should occur'. Semantically complete gerund phrase matching JP гҒ“гҒЁ-nominalization, but lacks closing punctuation.
findings.evidence: EN len=120, ends 'occur' (no period). JP ends 'гҒ“гҒЁ' (complete). Meaning fully preserved.
findings.impact: NON-RELEASE: Punctuation only; meaning complete and accurate

findings.detail: All 5 mathematical formulas (MTBF, MTTR, зЁјеғҚзҺҮ, Serial availability, Parallel availability) are consistent across JP/ZH/EN. Operators Г· Г— preserved correctly.
findings.evidence: 5/5 formula entities cross-checked: MTBF=зЁјеғҚжҷӮй–“еҗҲиЁҲГ·ж•…йҡңеӣһж•°, MTTR=ж•…йҡңжҷӮй–“еҗҲиЁҲГ·ж•…йҡңеӣһж•°, зЁјеғҚзҺҮ=MTBFГ·(MTBF+MTTR), serial=AГ—B, parallel=1-(1-A)Г—(1-B)

findings.detail: All 18 term entities have accurate trilingual surfaces. Key translations verified: гғ•гӮ©гғјгғ«гғҲгғҲгғ¬гғ©гғігғҲвҶ’Fault Tolerant/е®№й”ҷ, гғ•гӮ§гғјгғ«гӮҪгғ•гғҲвҶ’Fail-Soft/ж•…йҡңејұеҢ–, гғ•гӮ§гғјгғ«гӮ»гғјгғ•вҶ’Fail-Safe/ж•…йҡңе®үе…Ё, гғ•гғјгғ«гғ—гғ«гғјгғ•вҶ’Foolproof/йҳІе‘Ҷи®ҫи®Ў, гғҗгӮ№гӮҝгғ–жӣІз·ҡвҶ’Bathtub Curve/жөҙзӣҶжӣІзәҝ, зӣҙеҲ—/дёҰеҲ—гӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ вҶ’Serial/Parallel System/дёІиҒ”/е№¶иҒ”зі»з»ҹ. All 18/18 terms matched in glossary.
findings.evidence: 18/18 glossary matched; 0 term entities with missing surface/definition across all 3 languages

findings.detail: 8 ZH definitions flagged algorithmically for EN/ZH length ratio > 3.5x (range 3.6x-4.6x). Manual review of 3 samples (зЁјеғҚзҺҮ, гғ•гғјгғ«гғ—гғ«гғјгғ•, гғҗгӮ№гӮҝгғ–жӣІз·ҡ) confirms semantic completeness вҖ” ratios are due to CJK ideographic density vs English verbosity, not truncation.
findings.evidence: Sample: ZH зЁјеғҚзҺҮ 33 chars = EN 151 chars in meaning; ZH гғҗгӮ№гӮҝгғ–жӣІз·ҡ 96 chars = EN 350 chars. All 3 phases of bathtub curve present in all 3 languages.
findings.impact: CLEAN вҖ” false positives from algorithm

findings.detail: Duplicate term entries (гғ•гӮ©гғјгғ«гғҲгғҲгғ¬гғ©гғігғҲГ—2 on p383/p384; иӨҮеҗҲгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ Г—2 on p386/p387) are intentionally complementary: p383/p386 provide conceptual definitions, p384/p387 provide operational/contextual definitions. No contradictions detected.
findings.evidence: гғ•гӮ©гғјгғ«гғҲгғҲгғ¬гғ©гғігғҲ: p383 = design philosophy, p384 = design definition; иӨҮеҗҲгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ : p386 = general def, p387 = availability calculation context

findings.detail: EN translation of 'зЁјеғҚзҺҮ' as 'Availability Rate' is semantically correct but industry more commonly uses bare 'Availability' (ISO/IEC 25010, ITIL). 'Availability Rate' is not wrong but slightly non-standard.
findings.evidence: JP зЁјеғҚзҺҮ = uptime ratio = availability; standard EN is 'availability' or 'operational availability'
findings.impact: NON-RELEASE: Acceptable translation; no correction required

summary: Chunk 37 (pages 382-391) covers system reliability concepts: MTBF/MTTR/зЁјеғҚзҺҮ, fault-tolerance design patterns (Fault Tolerant/Fail-Soft/Fail-Safe/Foolproof), serial/parallel/composite systems, and the Bathtub Curve. CRITICAL: 17/17 non-term entities (figures, sections, tables, chapter markers, practice questions) are entirely empty across all 3 languages вҖ” a release-impacting structural defect (F001). The 18 term entities are of high quality: all formulas mathematically consistent across JP/ZH/EN (F004), all glossary terms matched (F005), duplicate entries are complementary not contradictory (F007). Minor issues: 1 cosmetic punctuation inconsistency (F002), 1 missing terminal period in EN (F003), 1 slightly non-standard EN terminology (F008). ZH length ratio false positives confirmed as CJK density artifact, not truncation (F006).
